allow: Bash(powershell -command "Get-Process | Sort-Object CPU -Descending | Select-Object -First 20 Name, CPU, WorkingSet | Format-Table -AutoSize")
Bash(powershell -command "Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem | Select-Object TotalVisibleMemorySize, FreePhysicalMemory | Format-List")
Bash(powershell -command "Get-Process chrome | Select-Object Id, Name, CPU, WorkingSet, MainWindowTitle | Format-Table -AutoSize")

Bash(powershell -command "Get-Process chrome -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, Name, WorkingSet | Format-Table -AutoSize; if \(-not \(Get-Process chrome -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\)\) { Write-Host 'All Chrome processes cleared!' }")
Bash(powershell -command "Get-PSDrive C | Select-Object Used, Free | Format-List")
Bash(powershell -command "Get-Process | Sort-Object CPU -Descending | Select-Object -First 15 Name, CPU, WorkingSet | Format-Table -AutoSize")
Bash(powershell -command "Get-Process OneDrive -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, CPU, WorkingSet | Format-Table -AutoSize")

Bash(powershell -command "Stop-Process -Name TotalAV -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Stop-Process -Name endpointprotection -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Stop-Process -Name SecurityService -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Stop-Process -Name TotalSecurityService -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host 'Done'")
Bash(powershell -command "Get-Process | Sort-Object CPU -Descending | Select-Object -First 10 Name, CPU, WorkingSet | Format-Table -AutoSize")
Bash(powershell -command "Get-Process chrome | Select-Object Id, CPU, WorkingSet, MainWindowTitle | Sort-Object CPU -Descending | Format-Table -AutoSize")
